## Problem

Describe the user, integrator, compatibility, security, or maintenance problem.

## Design

Link the design note, ADR, and tracker item. Summarize the accepted approach and
important alternatives.

## Verification

- [ ] Formatting and linting pass.
- [ ] Relevant unit, integration, fixture, and documentation tests pass.
- [ ] Platform/WASM impact is covered or documented.
- [ ] Performance impact is measured or not applicable.

## Impact

- Public API:
- Compatibility and round trip:
- Security and privacy:
- UX and accessibility:
- Documentation:

## Tracker

Link the updated tracker item and any follow-up work.
